content.text: How can I safely check if an application setup object has the expected `IS_RELEASE` status?
What happens if I pass a setup object where `IS_RELEASE` exists but has a non-boolean value?
The comparison relies on Python's inherent truthiness, meaning any non-empty string or number will evaluate to True. If you need strict boolean enforcement, you should validate the type.
This helps me avoid hard crashes during startup.
